decisions.label: note
decisions.message: Process miss on Mission_HornetBoss turn 1: after compaction the handoff said the held End Turn click was still pending, but the live screen was already a new player turn with ACTION AVAILABLE labels and Victory in 3 turns; my extra calibrated End Turn skipped HQ turn 2, missed the exact post-enemy audit window, and caused grid to fall 7/7 -> 4/7. Snapshot m05_post_enemy_audit_missed_window_hq captured the actual board; docs/agent/safety-gates.md now requires a fresh read before any resume/handoff End Turn click.

block.next_step: Snapshot and investigate why the exact post-enemy window was missed. Do not use this late board as simulator evidence; clear the block only after the process cause is understood.
block.resolve_reason: Process cause understood: compaction/handoff state was stale. A previous End Turn had already advanced Mission_HornetBoss from turn 1 to turn 2 player phase, but the resume summary said the click was pending. The extra calibrated End Turn clicked on a live READY player turn skipped HQ turn 2, so the turn-1 post-enemy audit window was missed; this late turn-3 board is not simulator evidence. Snapshot m05_post_enemy_audit_missed_window_hq and decision log record the miss; safety-gates rule 391 now requires a fresh read before any resume-held End Turn click. Continuing from the actual turn-3 board at grid 4/7.
